artificial-intelligence.includes: AI, machine learning, LLMs, neural networks, model architectures, training, inference, AI tools and coding assistants, prompt engineering
artificial-intelligence.excludes: Software that merely uses AI as a minor feature (classify under the primary domain instead)

software-engineering.includes: Programming, developer tools, frameworks, mobile development, React Native, distributed systems, version control, CLI tools, APIs
software-engineering.excludes: AI-specific tools and models (those go under artificial-intelligence)

history.includes: Historical events, periods, civilizations, medieval history, ancient history, cultural transmission between civilizations
history.excludes: History of a specific field (that goes under the field, e.g. education history under education)

education.includes: Teaching, learning, pedagogy, curriculum, universities, educational research, developer education
education.excludes: Self-directed knowledge management tools (those go under knowledge-management)

linguistics.includes: Languages, language policy, constructed languages, language endangerment, translation, multilingualism
linguistics.excludes: Language learning apps and methods (those go under education)

literature.includes: Literary works, authors, literary criticism, poetry, novels, literary movements
literature.excludes: Technical or academic writing (those go under their subject domain)

politics.includes: Policy, governance, political movements, climate policy, industrial policy, geopolitics, elections
politics.excludes: Political philosophy without policy focus (that goes under philosophy)

knowledge-management.includes: PKM tools, note-taking systems, knowledge graphs, reading tools, incremental reading, spaced repetition, information organization
knowledge-management.excludes: General productivity without knowledge focus (that goes under productivity)

philosophy.includes: Philosophical traditions, ethics, epistemology, comparative philosophy, authorship theory
philosophy.excludes: Applied ethics in specific domains (classify under the domain)

culture.includes: Cultural analysis, cultural construction, AI and society, work culture, media criticism

energy.includes: Energy policy, renewable energy, fossil fuels, energy infrastructure, climate and energy
energy.excludes: Climate policy without energy focus (that goes under politics)

art-architecture.includes: Visual arts, architecture, design, medieval architecture, art history
art-architecture.excludes: Software UI/UX design (that goes under software-engineering)

ai-coding-tools.includes: AI coding assistants, code generation, AI-assisted development, Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor
ai-coding-tools.excludes: General LLM applications not focused on coding

ai-orchestration.includes: Multi-agent coordination, agent frameworks, tool use, MCP, agent loops, autonomous agents

model-architecture.includes: Model design, attention mechanisms, transformer architectures, model capabilities, benchmarks
model-architecture.excludes: Using models as tools (that goes under ai-coding-tools or llm-applications)

llm-applications.includes: Using LLMs for specific tasks, prompt engineering, AI assistants, chatbots, content generation
llm-applications.excludes: Model architecture research (that goes under model-architecture)

mobile-development.includes: React Native, Expo, mobile frameworks, iOS/Android development

distributed-systems.includes: Git, version control, worktrees, distributed architecture, microservices

medieval-mediterranean.includes: Medieval Sicily, Norman conquest, Arabic-Latin cultural exchange, Crusades, Mediterranean trade

italian-history.includes: Italian unification, Southern Question, Renaissance, city-states, modern Italy
italian-history.excludes: Medieval Sicily specifically (that goes under medieval-mediterranean)

pedagogy.includes: Teaching methods, Socratic method, Montessori, progressive education, educational philosophy
pedagogy.excludes: Educational technology and tools (those go under education-technology)

language-learning.includes: Language acquisition, Duolingo, immersion, vocabulary learning, language apps

reading-tools.includes: Read-later apps, Readwise, Obsidian for reading, incremental reading tools, reading workflows

incremental-reading.includes: SuperMemo-style progressive reading, spaced repetition for reading, knowledge extraction from texts
incremental-reading.excludes: General spaced repetition for flashcards (that goes under spaced-repetition)

spaced-repetition.includes: FSRS, Anki, spaced repetition algorithms, memory scheduling
spaced-repetition.excludes: Incremental reading specifically (that goes under incremental-reading)

knowledge-graphs.includes: Graph-based knowledge representation, semantic networks, ontologies, linked data

language-policy.includes: Official language designation, language rights, multilingual policy, language planning
language-policy.excludes: Language learning methods (those go under education)

constructed-languages.includes: Esperanto, conlangs, planned languages, auxiliary languages

italian-literature.includes: Italian authors, Pirandello, Verga, Dante, Italian literary movements, verismo

european-climate-policy.includes: EU climate regulations, green deal, carbon pricing, European environmental policy
european-climate-policy.excludes: Energy technology without policy focus (that goes under energy)

green-industrial-policy.includes: Industrial strategy for green transition, battery manufacturing, EV policy, green subsidies
green-industrial-policy.excludes: Pure energy technology (that goes under energy)

comparative-philosophy.includes: East-West philosophy, Confucian thought, cross-cultural philosophical analysis
comparative-philosophy.excludes: Philosophy of a specific domain (classify under that domain)

medieval-architecture.includes: Romanesque, Gothic, Norman architecture, Cappella Palatina, cathedral building
